mapper.select:
/* adm-system-menuhistory-sql-oracle.xml - selectMenuHistoryCount */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TADMIN_INFO_URMEHS MEHS INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_UR UR ON MEHS.URKEY = UR.URKEY INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_ME MENU ON MEHS.MEKEY = MENU.MEKEY INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_MULAAPMSG_HD MUHD ON MENU.MENM = MUHD.MULAAPMSGHDKEY INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_MULAAPMSG_DT MUDT ON MUDT.MULAAPMSGHDKEY = MUHD.MULAAPMSGHDKEY AND MUDT.LAKEY = #{slakey} WHERE 1=1
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
